primaryQueries: هل عطلة الربيع في مارس أم أبريل

competitors.reason: Strong official Arabic source showing that the UAE Ministry calendar for 2025-2026 includes a clearly named spring break from 16 to 29 March 2026 for public schools and private schools following the Ministry curriculum.

Useful Arabic official contrast source because the Kuwait calendar does not frame the same period as one simple pan-Arab spring break; instead it uses terms like mid-year break and a special Ramadan leave.
Useful Arabic official support showing that academic-year transitions and registration in Qatar resumed on 12 April 2026, reinforcing that timing and naming differ by system.
Strong official English comparison showing the 2026-2027 UAE spring break moved to 5-9 April 2027, which helps prove that even within one system the timing can change by year.
Useful official government summary confirming the UAE 2025-2026 spring break dates and scope.

Useful only as a lightweight English comparison page for how general school-calendar guides frame the intent. It is weaker than official ministry material and was not treated as a primary factual source.

replacedCompetitors.reason: Useful headline but the accessible page redirected and was not stable enough for extraction.
Helpful comparison wording but weaker than the official UAE Ministry pages.
Good country-specific school-holiday summary, but the current page intent is pan-Arab and required stronger official ministry coverage.

competitorFindings.title: التقويم الأكاديمي للعام الدراسي 2025 – 2026
contentSignals: Clear date block for spring break: 16 to 29 March 2026
Explicit scope: public schools and private schools following the Ministry curriculum
weaknesses: Does not explain why other countries use different names or timings

competitorFindings.title: رزنامة الوزارة
contentSignals: Shows special leave at the end of Ramadan in March 2026
weaknesses: Not optimized for the search phrase spring vacation

competitorFindings.title: وزارة التربية والتعليم تعلن مواعيد وآلية تسجيل الطلبة للعام الدراسي 2026–2027
contentSignals: Official Arabic ministry timing for the new academic cycle
Useful support for how systems resume after their break periods
weaknesses: Indirect evidence for the timing intent

competitorFindings.title: Academic calendar for the 2026-2027 Academic Year
contentSignals: Shows year-to-year change within the same education system

competitorFindings.title: Ministry of Education Qatar School Calendar 2025-2026
contentSignals: English comparison framing for parent intent
weaknesses: Weaker factual authority than ministry sources
Better for comparison than for final fact claims

coverageMatrix.whyItMatters: This is the primary head query and needs a direct answer that removes the assumption of one universal date.
This is the real user confusion that generic countdown pages usually fail to answer.
This captures practical parent intent and makes the page more useful than a date-only result.
This supports the strongest official example in the comparison.
This supports the contrast case where naming and structure differ.

coverageMatrix.keyword: هل عطلة الربيع في مارس أم أبريل
coverageMatrix.whyItMatters: This covers the year-to-year and country-to-country timing confusion.
This captures common Arabic wording used by parents and students.
This supports the comparison angle instead of pretending the page is a single-country official notice.

شرح لماذا لا تستخدم كل وزارة اسم عطلة الربيع نفسه
أمثلة رسمية تقارن بين نظام يعلن عطلة ربيع واضحة ونظام يستخدم أسماء مختلفة
تحويل نية العد التنازلي إلى قرار عملي: كيف تتحقق من الموعد الصحيح لمدرستك
إجابة أول 100 كلمة على سؤال المستخدم بدل دفنه تحت تاريخ مرجعي عام

unansweredQuestions: هل عطلة الربيع موحدة في كل المدارس العربية؟
لماذا أرى تواريخ مختلفة لعطلة الربيع؟
لماذا لا أجد اسم عطلة الربيع في كل التقويمات الرسمية؟
هل تكون عطلة الربيع في مارس أم أبريل؟
كيف أعرف الموعد الصحيح لمدرسة أبنائي؟
differentiationIdeas: ابدأ الصفحة بجواب صريح: لا يوجد موعد عربي موحد.
استخدم الإمارات مثالاً واضحاً على وجود عطلة ربيع مسماة، والكويت مثالاً واضحاً على اختلاف التسمية والبنية.
اجعل الصفحة أداة تصحيح قرار لا مجرد عداد.
اكتب بالعربية وكأنك تشرح لولي أمر يريد الحجز أو ترتيب دوام الأسرة، لا كأنك تلخص تقويماً مدرسياً فقط.

notes: The competitive opportunity is to stop pretending there is one spring-vacation date for all Arab schools. The stronger page teaches the reader how to interpret the term across systems, then points them to the correct official calendar path.
